title: Middle-earth Adventures
description: This mod adds items, biomes, mob and also, structures!
body:
This mod adds items, biomes, mob and also, structures!

**ITEMS:**

The One Ring - when equiped, gives you invisibility and blindness.

Ring - an item of what you can craft groups of rings (elves' rings, dwarves' rings and humans' rings) 

Groups of rings (elves' rings, dwarves' rings and humans' rings) 

Mithril Ingot - you can get it from new ore 

Raw Mithril - you can get it from new ore 

Mithril Pickaxe - new pickaxe 

Mithril Sword - new sword 

Mithril Template - with this, you can upgrade your diamond tools to mithril 

Mithril Chainmail - new piece of armor 

Mug - new item 

Mug of beer - gets by brewing wheat into mug 

Dwarf's axe - new weapon

The Arkenstone - useless item for deco 

Middle-earth map - just cool thing with a menu 

Mordor Lava (with bucket version) - get it from mordor building!  

Orc's sword - Orcs are using it as a weapon now 

Narsil - sword with 1 durability but with 1000 damage

Sauron's Mace - now Sauron uses it like a tool

Silver ingot - you can get it from mithril and gold ingots (craft like of netherite)

Silver Armor - new armor, similar to netherite armor characteristics 

Blocks of silver and mithril

Melted silver as a fluid

Sauron's finger as an item

Elf's cape is clothes

Elf's bow is a weapon

Cooked mushroom as a food

Orcrist as sword

Arkenstone block gives you some effects

Dead log, planks and leaves for new tree, which spawns in dead plains

Silver pickaxe is faster version of mithril

Shire pipe is a fun item that creates new particles

Palantir is a block that you can find in its altar and it has cool features

Nature staff - you can upgrade wizard staff to get it. Right clicking on block you are getting the same effect as from bone meal

Main staff - staff of Saruman. Can be crafted by upgrading nature staff

Miner table - table for new villagers profession

Spear - a weapon with 3d model

Fossils, fossil and professionally prepared fossils as ore

Marble and its polished version

Statues - created with pp fossils, cobbled deepslate and marble, with skull

Hammer - instrument that can transform stone block into plate

Powder Crafter - crafting table for powders

Quartz, Marble and Stone powders - give you different effects

Glove - allows you to hold ruby in your main hand

Ruby - gotten from new ore

Gold shield - give you armor

Magic flower is used to get:

Pollen - if you hold it without wearing breathing mask gives you allergy. You get it by right-clicking with hammer, holding it in your off-hand

Lembas - food that restores 20 nutrition and 10 of saturation

Rings with ruby, emerald, and diamond - can be combined with gloves to get effects

**MOBS:**
Orc - new mob that is spawning in mordor building or in dead plains

Sauron - 1000 hp, deals 15 damage, when you kill him you get Sauron's Finger 

Elfs - new mob that attack orcs and Sauron 

Dwarf - new mob that can be found in dwarves' mountain (as npc, he's not moving)

Spear - a weapon with 3d model

Fossils, fossil and professionally prepared fossils as ore

Marble 

Statues - created with pp fossils, cobbled deepslate and marble, with skull

Marble spikes - deal damage to every entity on it

Breaker - when restone powered, breaks block above

**BIOMES/STRUCTURES:**

Shire - new biome with hobbit's house as a structure

Dead plains - new biome with a mordor building and Sauron's Tower (rebuild of the mordor building. Sauron is spawning only there), human's camp, forge, dwarves' mountain, palantir's altar, lothlorien, fontain and stones as structures

**ADVANCEMENTS:**

My precious - you receive it when you get The One Ring.

Fly, you fools! - received when wizard's staff is gotten.

King under the mountain - can be received by getting arkenstone
